summary: Phase 5 - Advanced Attendance testing completed. Backend: 13/13 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All attendance features working correctly including filters, view modes, and summary cards.
seed_data_creation: Convocation created during testing to verify attendance record creation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Advanced Attendance fully functional. Attendance page at /attendance has 4 filters (Team, Season, Month, Event Type), 4 view modes (Por Jogador, Por Evento, Por Semana, Por Mês), 4 summary cards (Total Registos, Confirmados, Ausentes, Taxa Presença), and 3 summary by event type cards (Treinos, Jogos Campeonato, Torneios).

attendance_page_loads.description: Attendance page loads at /attendance with data-testid='attendance-page'

team_filter.description: Team filter dropdown works with data-testid='team-filter'

season_filter.description: Season filter dropdown works with 4 options (Todas as épocas, 2025/2026, 2024/2025, 2023/2024)

month_filter.description: Month filter dropdown works with 13 options (Todos os meses + 12 months)

event_type_filter.description: Event type filter dropdown works with 6 options (Todos os eventos, Treinos, Jogos Campeonato, Jogos Amigáveis, Torneios, Outros)

view_mode_por_jogador.description: Por Jogador view shows player attendance table with columns: Jogador, Total, Confirmado, Ausente, Pendente, Taxa

view_mode_por_evento.description: Por Evento view shows events list with attendance counts (Confirmados, Ausentes, Pendentes)

view_mode_por_semana.description: Por Semana view shows weeks with date ranges and event counts

view_mode_por_mes.description: Por Mês view shows months with event counts

summary_cards.description: 4 summary cards display: Total Registos, Confirmados, Ausentes, Taxa Presença

summary_by_event_type.description: 3 summary cards by event type: Treinos, Jogos Campeonato, Torneios

backend_team_attendance.description: Returns attendance records grouped by player with filters for month, event_type, championship_id

backend_attendance_summary.description: Returns monthly and by_event_type attendance summary

backend_event_attendance.description: Returns attendance records for specific event with summary
